action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 8 only ran model test (88s), didn't actually train. CRN at 5 epochs got PESQ=2.32 vs MetricGAN+ baseline=3.13. Analysis: Need to actually run training for many epochs. The model has 18.5M params which is reasonable. Loss was still improving at epoch 5. Decision: Fix train.py to properly train for 50 epochs with learning rate scheduling, resume from existing checkpoint if available, and use combined SI-SNR + multi-res STFT loss. Also increase segment length for better quality.
